chunks.text: 9\ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-80 | of 2016. ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON'BLE JUDGE For orders on office objection A'. For orders on M.A.No.7784 l20l6. For Hearing of main case. L2.O9.20ra. Mr. Ghayoor Abbas M. Shahani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Abro, advocate for respondent No.l. Mr. Abid Hussain Qadri, State Counsel. o[. 1 2 a ' \ J DATE OF HEARING I l Learned counsel lor the petitioner after arguing the matter at some length and being satisfied rvith the comments filed by the official respondents seeks disposal of this petition by directing the respondent No.5 i.e. Executive Engineer, Rice Canal Division, Larkana to ensure the supply of water as per due share ol the petitioner for the purpose of his agricultural. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposc'd
